title: The Matter of the Phasing Tower
summary: A tower has been reported on the outskirts of Dorel. Repeated sitings have stated the tower appears to be roughly 8 stories tall, early Imperial architecture, and topped with a green and blue stone. The Guild would like an assessment of this tower, and any dangers it might pose.
completion: A complete account of what the tower contains is delivered to the House, along with resolution of whatever threat - if any - is present.
reward: Variable, assessed by the House on return
